name: Car Seat Cleaning
description: Pet hair removal on car interior
environment_block: modern car interior with natural daylight through car windows, fabric car seat visibly covered in pet hair, car dashboard visible, steering wheel in background
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, handheld selfie mode from driver's seat, natural hand movement, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic phone exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
product_interaction_block: creator slowly drags FurLift across car seat in one motion, visibly removing pet hair from fabric, pauses to show collected hair, shows clean car seat surface
performance_block: surprised expression, natural smile, casual eye contact with camera, genuine disbelief at how well it works
platform_block: realistic TikTok UGC ad style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, fast social-media pacing
lighting_block: natural daylight through car windows, realistic car interior lighting, slight smartphone overexposure near windows
motion_block: slow handheld motion, natural body shifting in car seat, realistic wrist movement while filming selfie-style, smooth but imperfect movement
audio_block: subtle car interior ambience, fabric brushing sounds, quiet car tone, authentic creator speaking tone
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no beauty-filter look, no luxury influencer aesthetic
